title: decide-resubmit input
description:
Failure evidence for ``hpc_agent.ops.decide_resubmit.decide_resubmit``.

Drives the complete / resubmit / escalate decision for a terminal-with-failures wave. Lifts hpc-status Step 6's resubmit policy out of prose into code.

total_tasks.description: Total tasks in the wave (record.total_tasks). Must be >= 1; a failed fraction over zero tasks is undefined (SpecInvalid).
total_tasks.title: Total Tasks

resubmit_failed_threshold.description: Auto-resubmit at or below this failed fraction. The boundary is inclusive — failed_fraction == threshold still resubmits.
resubmit_failed_threshold.title: Resubmit Failed Threshold
